import datetime

# Correct: enforce that all datetimes crossing the API boundary are explicitly timezone-aware
def schedule_job(run_at: datetime.datetime):
    if run_at.tzinfo is None or run_at.tzinfo.utcoffset(run_at) is None:
        raise ValueError("run_at must be a timezone-aware datetime object")
    save_to_database(run_at.isoformat())
